name: hgf-pnl
description: Agent tools for HGF monthly close P&L ingestion, audit, and consolidated workbook generation.

interface.shortDescription: Ingest, audit, and generate HGF monthly P&L packages.
interface.longDescription: Provides agent instructions and local Python tooling for HGF monthly close package discovery, source extraction, review/audit manifests, and consolidated P&L workbook generation.
defaultPrompt: Discover this HGF close package and create a run manifest.
Run HGF extractors and summarize review warnings.
Generate the consolidated P&L workbook from approved values.
